## Design Considerations

<!-- Answer these based on AGENTS.md checklist -->

- [ ] Fits 8-directional control scheme?
- [ ] Affects permadeath/meta-progression balance?
- [ ] Consistent with minimalist pixel art style?
- [ ] Impacts essence economy or skill tree balance?
- [ ] Works on gamepad and keyboard+mouse?
- [ ] Scalable to future areas/worlds?
- [ ] Maintains 60 FPS target?
